title: Flankers-FAR
description: This EEG dataset comprises event-related potential (ERP) recordings from a flanker task experiment examining visual word recognition. Participants viewed four-letter words and pseudowords presented with varying flanker conditions (no flanker, identical flankers, or different flankers) while seated in a sound-attenuated room. The dataset includes 270 trials per participant and was collected at the NeuroCognition Laboratory at San Diego State University under IRB approval.
methods_description: EEG data were collected while participants performed a visual flanker task. Stimuli consisted of 90 four-letter real words and 90 four-letter pseudowords presented in white font on a black background at a viewing distance of 152 cm. Each trial began with a purple fixation cross (1000 ms), followed by a white fixation cross (500 ms), stimulus presentation (150 ms), and a blank screen until participant response via game controller. Participants completed 270 trials across three flanker conditions: no flanker, identical flankers, and different flankers.
